description_text: COPER2018'S STORE Item description Features: 1.Universal Car SUV Rear Bumper Diffuser Molding Shark Fin Spoiler Protector Cover 2.Anti-crash and anti wear. 3.100% Brand new and high quality. Specification: Material: PVC Color: Black/Carbon Fiber(as pictures show) Quantity: 4Pcs Package contents: 1* 4Pcs Rear Bumper Spoiler Note: 1. There may be slight size deviations due to manual measurement, different measuring methods and tools. 2. The picture may not reflect the actual color of the item because of different photographing light, angle and display monitor. Product overview Shipping Policy Payment Description Returns Policy About Us 1.Item location:Guangdong,China Item will be shipped out receipt of your payment. We ship the item through Hong Kong Air mail. Please make sure your address in eBay is correct. If you want to change the address, please give us ebay message right away you make the payment. Combing shipment is not allowed. If you wants to combine all the items together, you should still pay for all of the shipping, insurance and handing fees. Considering the cost of business and easy shipping, usually the item is packed in retail packaging. Normally, the item will arrive in 15-20 days. But sometimes it takes a little bit longer, goes to 20-30 days or more 2.Item location:Leicestershire,UK Item will be shipped out within 24 hours upon receipt of your payment. Orders from the UK will all be shipped out via Carrier Hermes or Royal mail .Usually it takes up 3~8 business days for delivery.
